hero.title: Translate your app without leaving the browser
hero.subtitle: Hover any text, click, edit, and save. Your translation files are rewritten on disk — formatting preserved, no rebuild required.
hero.trustNote: Loved by {{count}} teams shipping in {{locales}}+ languages.

stats.uptime: 99.9% uptime — it runs on your machine

features.heading: Everything you need to localize fast
features.subheading: Built for developers and translators to work side by side.

inContext.title: In-context editing
inContext.body: See exactly where a string lives. What you edit is what your users read.

noRebuild.title: No rebuild, no restart
noRebuild.body: Changes hit your JSON files instantly while the dev server keeps running.

formatSafe.title: Format-safe writes
formatSafe.body: Indentation, key order, and trailing commas survive every save — diffs stay clean.

rtlReady.title: RTL-ready
rtlReady.body: Arabic, Hebrew & Persian render right-to-left out of the box. Test layouts the moment you switch.

step1.title: 1. Hover
step1.body: Move your cursor over any translated text to reveal its key.

step2.title: 2. Edit
step2.body: Click to open the floating editor and rewrite the value in place.

step3.title: 3. Save
step3.body: Press save and the matching key in *.json is updated on disk.

pricing.heading: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subheading: Free while it's local. Pay only when your team grows.

team.name: Team
team.tagline: For shipping teams of any size

q1.q: Does it work without a build step?
q1.a: Yes — it runs entirely during ng serve and writes straight to your translation files.

q2.q: Will it mess up my JSON formatting?
q2.a: No. We preserve indentation & key order so your git diffs only show what actually changed.

q3.a: We target @ngx-translate/core today, with more adapters on the way.

cta.title: Ready to translate the easy way?
cta.subtitle: Drop the inspector into your dev server and edit your first key in under a minute.

footer.tagline: The in-context translation editor for Angular.
